title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, published on PyPI as `ollama`.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as `ollama`.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (PyPI: `langchain-ollama`) to use Ollama models as LLMs, embeddings, or tool-calling agents.

title: ollama-webui (formerly Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for any Ollama model; runs in Docker and supports multi-user, RAG, and plugins.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration (PyPI: `ollama-haystack`) providing generators & embedders backed by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: VS Code extension that brings Ollama models into the editor as AI coding copilots.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama (Maven Central: `io.github.amithkoujalgi:ollama4j`).

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: Official docs and helper scripts for running Ollama with NVIDIA GPUs (CUDA & ROCm).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around `ollama` with chat history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-made docker-compose stacks for Ollama + WebUI + GPU pass-through.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that answers questions using a local Ollama model via Bolt.js.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts from within notes using Ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate (crates.io: `ollama-rs`) providing typed async/sync bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library (NuGet: `OllamaSharp`) for chatting with Ollama models from C#.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service that exposes OpenAI-compatible endpoints backed by Ollama for drop-in replacement.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of curated Modelfile definitions (Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.) maintained by the Ollama team.
